name: empty-outline
visual_summary: empty-outline is a UI component used to provide a placeholder or a temporary container for content that will be added in the future. It is typically used when a developer wants to visually indicate a section or block of content is empty but reserved for something else. The component usually appears as a bordered container with or without a default text.
generation_prompt:
Create a production-ready card component with the following characteristics:

Name: empty-outline
Description: empty-outline is a UI component used to provide a placeholder or a temporary container for content that will be added in the future. It is typically used when a developer wants to visually indicate a section or block of content is empty but reserved for something else. The component usually appears as a bordered container with or without a default text.
Style: modern, material, neutral
Interactions: none, disabled
Tags: registry, placeholder, card

Requirements:
- Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS
- Uses Tailwind CSS for styling
- Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation
- Responsive and mobile-friendly
- No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary
- Include all necessary imports
- Export as default with sensible prop types

Generate clean production-ready code only. No explanations.
